title: Mike Deodato, Jr.
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Person |image=[[File:MikeDeodatoJr.png]] |name=Mike Deodato, Jr. |birth=[[May 23]], [[1960s|1963]]
[[Wikipedia:Campina Grande|Campina Grande]], [[Wikipedia:Paraíba|Paraíba]], [[Wikipedia:Brazil|Brazil]] |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality=[[Wikipedia:Brazilians|Brazilian]] |occupation=Comic book artist |companies= |website=[http://www.mikedeodatojr.com Mike Deodato Jr.] }} {{Quote|The ''Star Wars'' characters are legends of pop culture and the response I have had from fans since my name was announced has been overwhelming.|Mike Deodato, Jr|{{Marvel|url=news/comics/25318/open_mike_deodatos_star_wars_sketchbook|text=Open Mike Deodato's Star Wars Sketchbook}}}} '''Mike Deodato, Jr.''' (born '''Deodato Taumaturgo Borges Filho''' on [[May 23]], [[1960s|1963]]) is a [[Wikipedia:Brazilians|Brazilian]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] artist who penciled the comic story "[[Outbid But Never Outgunned]]" published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. Deodato has drawn the [[Vader Down 1|first]],{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/57747/star_wars_vader_down_2015_1|text=Star Wars: Vader Down (2015) #1}} [[Star Wars (2015) 13|third]],{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/52664/star_wars_2015_13|text=Star Wars (2015) #13}} and [[Star Wars (2015) 14|fifth]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/55763/star_wars_2015_14|text=Star Wars (2015) 14}} issues of [[Marvel Comics]]' crossover event ''[[Star Wars: Vader Down]]''. He provided the main cover to four issues from [[Star Wars Book V: The Last Flight of the Harbinger|''The Last Flight of the Harbinger'']] story arc and variant covers for the [[Star Wars (2015) 1|first issue]] and all five issues of [[Star Wars Book VI: Yoda's Secret War|''Yoda's Secret War'']] from the [[Star Wars (2015)|''Star Wars'']] series. He also drew the cover for [[The Force Awakens Adaptation 3|''The Force Awakens Adaptation'' 3]],{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/59018/star_wars_the_force_awakens_adaptation_2016_3|text=Star Wars: The Force Awakens Adaptation (2016) #3}} as well as variant covers for various other issues, such as the first issues of [[Star Wars: Poe Dameron|''Poe Dameron'']] and [[Star Wars: Shattered Empire|''Shattered Empire'']]. He has also worked on many other Marvel series', with lengthy runs on titles such as [[W:c:marvel:Amazing Spider-Man Vol 1|''The Amazing Spider-Man'']], [[W:c:marvel:Dark Avengers Vol 1|''Dark Avengers'']] and [[W:c:marvel:New Avengers Vol 2|''New Avengers'']]. Prior to working together on ''Vader Down'', Deodato had previously collaborated with writer [[Jason Aaron]] on the [[W:c:marvel:Original Sin Vol 1|''Original Sin'']] event. {{Artist-stub}} ==Star Wars bibliography== ===Cover Artist=== *[[Star Wars (2015) 1|''Star Wars'' (2015) 1]] (variant) *[[Lando 5|''Lando'' 5]] (variant) *[[Shattered Empire 1|''Shattered Empire'' 1]] (variant) *[[Shattered Empire 3|''Shattered Empire'' 3]] (variant) *[[Poe Dameron 1|''Poe Dameron'' 1]] (variant) *[[The Force Awakens Adaptation 3|''The Force Awakens Adaptation'' 3]] *[[Star Wars (2015) 22|''Star Wars'' (2015) 22]] *[[Star Wars (2015) 23|''Star Wars'' (2015) 23]] *[[Star Wars (2015) 24|''Star Wars'' (2015) 24]] *[[Star Wars (2015) 25|''Star Wars'' (2015) 25]] *[[Star Wars (2015) 26|''Star Wars'' (2015) 26]] (variant) *[[Star Wars (2015) 27|''Star Wars'' (2015) 27]] (variant) *[[Star Wars (2015) 28|''Star Wars'' (2015) 28]] (variant) *[[Star Wars (2015) 29|''Star Wars'' (2015) 29]] (variant) *[[Star Wars (2015) 30|''Star Wars'' (2015) 30]] (variant) ===Penciler=== *"[[Outbid But Never Outgunned]]" *[[Vader Down 1|''Vader Down'' 1]] *[[Star Wars (2015) 13|''Star Wars'' (2015) 13]] *[[Star Wars (2015) 14|''Star Wars'' (2015) 14]] ==Sources== *{{SW|url=news/open-mike-deodatos-vader-down-sketchbook-part-2|text=Open Mike Deodato's ''Vader Down'' Sketchbook, Part 2}} *{{SW|url=news/its-sith-vs-rebels-in-vader-down-1-exclusive-preview|text=It's Sith Vs. Rebels in ''Vader Down'' #1 – Exclusive Preview}} *{{InsiderCite|164|Blaster (department)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images by Mike Deodato, Jr.}} *{{DeviantArt|username=mikedeodatojr|name=Mike Deodato, Jr.|archivedate=20190214010659}} *{{Twitter|username=mikedeodato|name=Mike Deodato, Jr.|archivedate=20120825220155}} *{{WP|Mike Deodato}} *{{Marvel|url=news/comics/25318/open_mike_deodatos_star_wars_sketchbook|text=Open Mike Deodato's Star Wars Sketchbook}} {{Interlang |es=Mike Deodato, Jr. |ka=მაიკ დეოდატო უმცროსი }} [[Category:Comic book cover artists]] [[Category:Comic book inkers]] [[Category:Comic book pencillers]]
